data.title: FIBRA Macquarie México Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Mexico City - FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) (BMV: FIBRAMQ12) released its financial and operational performance for Q2 2026. On May 29, 2026, FIBRA Monterrey (FIBRA MTY) (BMV: FMTY14) successfully concluded its public tender and exchange offer for FIBRAMQ CBFIs, with over 80% of FIBRAMQ's certificates being tendered. data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Abbott Laboratories and Exact Sciences Corporation Under Investigation for Data Breach of Patient Records
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco into a data breach that resulted in unauthorized entry to the confidential data of patients associated with Abbott Laboratories, a healthcare and medical device company based in Illinois. The breach occurred on July 23, 2026, leading to potential exposure of important personal information. Abbott Laboratories is a prominent company known for its healthcare solutions and medical devices, and this breach has raised concerns about data security for approximately millions of patients whose information may have been compromised.

data.title: Senator criticizes GOP's CLARITY Act as 'garbage': Dems challenge ethics rules in proposal by Senate Republicans.
data.description: Senate Republicans unveiled the proposed text for the CLARITY Act on Wednesday amidst criticism from Democrats over its ethics regulations. The bill is set to undergo further scrutiny in the Senate before potentially becoming law. Key numbers include the number of Senate Republicans involved in drafting the act, the specific ethics provisions under dispute, and the timeline for the bill's legislative process.

WSJ reports Stripe is in talks to acquire OpenRouter, an AI model aggregation platform, for close to $10B. OpenRouter routes 400+ models through one API and was valued at just $1.3B in May, about 7.7x below the reported price. Talks could still fall through.

data.title: MOREH Showcases High-Performance LLM Inference on AMD GPUs at AMD Advancing AI 2026
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in San Francisco, Moreh, a company specializing in AI infrastructure software and headed by CEO Gangwon Jo, took part in AMD Advancing AI 2026. The event, AMD's primary yearly AI showcase, occurred on July 22-23 in San Francisco. Moreh showcased its distributed inference technology at the event.

data.title: Walnut Coding's Young Coders Serve as 'Instructors' at Huawei Cloud Developer Training Camp
data.description: Two students aged 8 and 15 have demonstrated advanced project-building skills related to artificial intelligence. This achievement took place in Beijing on July 23, 2026. The students were part of Walnut Coding, a prominent online platform for teaching coding to young individuals. This news is significant as it showcases the growing capabilities of the younger generation in technology-related fields. The students successfully transitioned from conceptualizing ideas to developing fully functional applications. The age range of the students involved highlights the early exposure and interest in coding and AI, with the potential for future innovations in the tech industry.

data.title: BitMEX removes 65 trading pairs and derivatives in July; only 19 removed in first half of the year.
data.description: In July, BitMEX is set to eliminate a total of 65 derivative contracts and trading pairs, a significant increase from the mere 19 that were removed in the first half of the year.
